title: Lafocuse 10" LCD Large Display Digital Clock, Wall Mounted and Desktop, Battery Operated Electronic Clocks with Date, Day, Temperature, Snooze Function for Elderly, Living Room Bedroom Office, White
features: 10 Inch LCD Display: In addition to a large and clear numerical time display, the digital clock also shows the seconds, date, day of the week, temperature and humidity at the same time, offering you more convenience in your daily life.
Desk Clock & Wall Clock: Equipped with two durable hooks and a stand handle, this LCD clock large display can be used both on desk and hung on the wall.

Battery Operated: The digital wall clock is powered by 3 AAA batteries only(not included), no need outlet or USB, eliminating messy cables that could disrupt your life. Additionally, the clock's position can also be easily adjusted.

Snooze Function: When the alarm rings, you can press the large "SNOOZE" button on the top of the digital alarm clock to take a nap for extra 5 minutes. If you don't require the snooze time, just press any of the other buttons at the top to stop the alarm.

Great Gift Idea: This modern and easy to read desktop clock offers precise timekeeping without any annoying ticking noise, making it ideal for heavy sleepers, kids and seniors. It's also a thoughtful gift for birthdays, graduations, housewarmings and New Year's celebrations.
description: Product Description Digital Wall & Desk Clock Equipped with two durable hooks and a sturdy stand handle, it can be used as a wall clock and desk clock.
